channel.title: Australian-Languages on Hywel Stoakes
channel.description: Recent content in Australian-Languages on Hywel Stoakes

item.title: Australian Languages
item.description: The Sounds of Australian Aboriginal Languages This is a short series of videos aimed at the general viewer that introduces some of the sounds of Australian Languages. (Video Series). This video series is hosted by the Research Unit for Indigenous Language (RUIL), whose home is in the Faculty of Arts at the University of Melbourne. The videos include infomation on: Vowels Word Initial Velar Nasals
